title: Waterloo
why_this_song: Waterloo by ABBA (1974) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I tried to hold you back, but you were stronger
And I have met my destiny in quite a similar way

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "waterloo" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "waterloo" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "knowing" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "knowing" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: The history book on the shelf
I was defeated, you won the war
So how could I ever refuse

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask ABBA one question about "Waterloo", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para ABBA sobre "Waterloo", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Waterloo" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Waterloo" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Waterloo" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Waterloo" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?
